channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Ariana Grande @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-06-07 03:00 → 2026-06-11 03:00 — Ariana Grande at Oakland Arena. Ariana Grande's tour is highly anticipated and her live performances are known for their energy and production value.

item.title: Alabama Shakes @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-30 03:00 → 2026-05-31 03:00 — Alabama Shakes at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Alabama Shakes are celebrated for their powerful live shows and unique blend of rock and soul.

item.title: Yellowcard @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-28 02:00 — Yellowcard at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Yellowcard's nostalgia factor and their iconic sound make this a must-see for fans of early 2000s pop-punk.

item.title: Seven Lions @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-30 02:30 → 2026-05-31 02:30 — Seven Lions at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Seven Lions is known for his captivating electronic performances, making this show a highlight for EDM fans.

item.title: Louis Tomlinson @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-07 02:00 — Louis Tomlinson at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Louis Tomlinson's solo tour is generating buzz, appealing to both One Direction fans and new listeners.

item.title: Alesso @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-06 03:00 — Alesso at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. This show features a well-known DJ, appealing to fans of electronic music.

item.title: Kesha @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-05-28 02:00 — Kesha at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Kesha's return to the stage promises a fun and empowering experience for fans.

item.title: Chapterhouse @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-05-29 03:00 — Chapterhouse at August Hall. Alesso's performance is a highlight for electronic music fans, promising an energetic atmosphere.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their unique sound and engaging live performances.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses' tour is expected to deliver a mesmerizing blend of electronic and live instrumentation.

item.title: Belle & Sebastian @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-11 03:00 — Belle & Sebastian at The Masonic. Belle & Sebastian's performance of classic songs is a treat for long-time fans.

item.title: Forrest Frank @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-07-15 02:00 — Forrest Frank at Oakland Arena. For fans of indie rock, Vundabar and Yot Club offer an exciting pairing for a night of fresh sounds.

item.title: Vundabar @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-05-30 02:30 — Vundabar at August Hall. Dance With The Dead's unique blend of electronic and rock is sure to deliver an engaging show.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE's world tour is generating excitement among K-pop fans, promising a vibrant performance.

item.title: James Blake @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-12 02:00 — James Blake at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. James Blake's tour is highly anticipated, known for his emotionally charged performances.
